scope: multi-turn accumulation across chat-message-handler and text-complete-handler

evidence.failure_reason: handleChatMessage hardcodes turnNumber: 1 instead of calculating sequential turn number from existing turns array
evidence.output_excerpt:
FAIL > assigns sequential turnNumber to each turn across handlers
AssertionError: expected 1 to be 3 // Object.is equality
  at line 161: expect(content.turns[2].turnNumber).toBe(3)

root_cause.description: handleChatMessage hardcodes turnNumber to 1 on every call. Should calculate turnNumber from existing turns array (like text-complete-handler does with existing.turns.length + 1).

fix_required: Change chat-message-handler.ts to calculate turnNumber from loaded session's turns.length + 1, matching text-complete-handler's pattern
recommended_next_action: hivemaker: fix chat-message-handler.ts turnNumber calculation, then hitea re-runs to verify GREEN
